v5_v2_design_call.summary: V5 v2 is a TIGHTER variant than v1. Most of v1's 'untested introductions' were actually concretizations of elements V4 already had (refund copy, SEBI badge, aggregate metrics, crown). v2 V5 keeps V4's correct scaffolding and changes 7 specific things, of which only 1 is fully untested.
v5_v2_design_call.cta_stack_decision: Option B — preserve dual_outline_plus_sticky, made functionally coherent (outline shows 3 free trades pre-payment; sticky activates ₹1 subscription). User-confirmed 2026-04-24.

citation.verbatim_quote: V4 screenshot shows dark theme. v1 matrix had this wrong.

layout.rationale_one_line: V4 already uses dark theme. Trust Seeker recovery V3 40% -> V4 50% likely attributable to dark-theme-restoration. Preserve.

citation.verbatim_quote: Bottom-modal popup interrupts. 31/50 users. Resolved in V1-V4.
V4 screenshot shows crown_header. v1 matrix had branding=none for V4 — wrong.

branding.rationale_one_line: V4 already has crown. V2/V3/V4 all have it. Preserve.

citation.verbatim_quote: All 4 post-Control variants use price + banner framing.

price_visibility.rationale_one_line: Banner format with price + refund + countdown is universal V1-V4.

citation.verbatim_quote: V4 outline says 'Unlock FREE trade' (singular) but banner says '3 FREE Trades' (plural). v5 fixes this by matching the offer count and being honest about what the CTA delivers.

cta_primary_label_outline.rationale_one_line: Honest framing matches the actual offer (3 trades) and resolves the dual-CTA copy mismatch friction (33% noticed in V4).

citation.verbatim_quote: V1's sticky CTA was 'Start FREE Trial @ ₹1'. V5 simplifies — outline already promises free; sticky just commits to ₹1 activation.

cta_secondary_label_sticky.rationale_one_line: Cleaner — outline carries the 'free' message; sticky carries the activation commitment.

citation.verbatim_quote: V4 already uses outline (top) + green sticky (bottom). High contrast green observed +6.42pt clean V2->V3.

cta_style.rationale_one_line: Preserve V4's high-converting style. Dark theme mutes the Trust Seeker green-penalty (V4 demonstrated this).

citation.verbatim_quote: User chose to preserve V4's dual stack and resolve mismatch via copy fix rather than removing the structure.

cta_stack.rationale_one_line: V4's 44% lift came partly from dual-CTA self-segmentation. Preserving with coherent copy is more defensible than removing.

citation.verbatim_quote: 6/50 users (41% of Skeptical) flagged countdown as manipulation. Persistent across V1-V4.

urgency_mechanism.replaces: countdown_timer (V4 had it — corrected from v1's 'none')
urgency_mechanism.rationale_one_line: Skeptical-only friction with no demonstrated cross-segment lift. V5 is the first variant to remove it. Bargain Hunter risk: timer may have helped urgency-driven conversion (V1 BH +16pt vs Control), but V4's 7-second avg conversion suggests structural urgency works without the timer.

refund_or_guarantee_copy.value_text_verbatim: Refund in 60s to source. No questions.

citation.verbatim_quote: V4 has 'Activate @ ₹1 & Get instant refund' (vague). V5 sharpens to specific SLA.

refund_or_guarantee_copy.replaces: implicit_refund (V4 had implicit_refund — corrected from v1's 'absent')
refund_or_guarantee_copy.rationale_one_line: Concretization, not introduction. 64% cite refund as strongest reassurance; making the SLA explicit closes Skeptical trust gap.

citation.verbatim_quote: V4 already has SEBI Reg + 85%+ + 3500+. v1 matrix had this as implicit — wrong.
V1 has BOTH aggregate (84.7% with wins/losses) AND named (TMPV/ZOMATO/RELIANCE +rupee). v1 matrix had only 'named_past_outcome' — incomplete.

evidence_detail.replaces: aggregate_metric (V4 had aggregate-only — corrected from v1's 'none')
evidence_detail.rationale_one_line: Restore V1's dual format. Aggregate addresses Trust Seeker; named addresses Curious Beginner. 71% of V1 users cited a stock by name.

citation.verbatim_quote: 12/12 (100%) Skeptical Investor friction with blurred card. Quote: 'Show me a real trade or don't.'

trade_evidence.rationale_one_line: Replace blurred Live Trade card with real Closed Trade card showing entry/exit/days/₹ gain. Highest-conviction lever — removes 100% of the persistent Skeptical friction.

citation.verbatim_quote: V1 prominently displays '914 wins · 62 losses' alongside the 84.7% accuracy claim. v1 matrix missed this entirely. It is V1's structural defense against cherry-picking.

wins_losses_disclosure.confidence: high (mechanism), medium (Skeptical lift attribution — confounded with V1's other trust elements)
wins_losses_disclosure.replaces: no (V4 didn't have it — corrected from v1's missing dimension)
wins_losses_disclosure.rationale_one_line: ADOPT V1's transparency format. Closes the cherry-picking adversary objection structurally — Skeptical sees that 84.7% accuracy is backed by a full denominator including 62 losses.

citation.verbatim_quote: All variants offer 3 free trades (Control: '3 STOCK/F&O IDEAS FOR FREE'; V1-V4: 'Claim 3 FREE Trades'). v1 matrix missed this — wrongly assumed singular '1 trade'.

trial_offer_count.rationale_one_line: v5 v1 wrongly used 'See 1 real trade, free'. Corrected to match the actual offer Univest makes to users.

drivers.evidence: V1 segment lift attribution (confounded but mechanism strong)
5 mechanisms target same segment via shared honesty-substrate
71% of V1 users cited a stock by name; primary anchor for this segment

curious_beginner.kill_condition: Curious < 30% after 2 weeks (named-wins anchor not transferring to Univest's actual stock picks)

drivers.evidence: Bargain Hunter may have been part of the 50% who liked V1 timer (V1 BH +16pt over Control)
more to read may slow the 7s decision
V1 was Trust Seeker's best at 60%

trust_seeker.kill_condition: Trust Seeker < 47% after 2 weeks (premium upgrades didn't compensate for green CTA penalty)

untested_stack_count._breakdown: Only real_closed_trade is fully untested (no observed datapoint for this exact UI). cta_outline_label is honest re-write of existing copy. explicit_sla is concretization of V4's existing implicit_refund. urgency_removed is the absence of an existing element.

confidence_rationale: v2 untested-stack count = 1 (down from 3 in v1). Most V5 elements are observed in V4 already; the change is concretization or copy coherence. Wilson intervals on n=10-15 per segment remain the binding uncertainty constraint, not synthesis quality.
